child_geo_events.name: Temporary Evacuation Point - CA Valley Community Services

data.information:
A temporary evacuation point is set up at the CA Valley CSD - 13080 Soda Lake Rd, Santa Margarita, CA 93453 - per Emergency SLO

The Temporary Evacuation Point is not open after regular business hours. 
The American Red Cross can be reached at 805-678-3073 for general questions.
